voice: Introducing the SA Healthcare Management System — a full-stack clinic platform built with PHP and MySQL.
caption: SA Healthcare Management System

voice: Staff log in by province, city, facility, and role — each with a tailored dashboard.
caption: Role-based login & dashboards

voice: Reception registers patients and tracks live queue status across the facility.
caption: Patient registration & queue

voice: MediAlert broadcasts emergency triage alerts to staff in real time.
caption: Emergency MediAlert notifications

voice: Nurses capture vitals, triage cases, and monitor patient flow with live KPIs.
caption: Nurse triage dashboard

voice: Vitals are saved and patients are sent directly to the doctor queue.
caption: Vitals capture & handoff

voice: Doctors see waiting patients, appointments, and facility announcements.
caption: Doctor consultation hub

voice: Run consultations, review medical history, and write prescriptions.
caption: Consultations & prescriptions

voice: Pharmacists manage dispensing queues and complete the patient visit.
caption: Pharmacy dispensing workflow

voice: Medication is dispensed and patients are marked completed automatically.
caption: Dispense & complete visit

voice: Built-in Chart.js reporting tracks every stage of the patient journey.
caption: Analytics & reporting

voice: Explore the full source code on GitHub — SA Healthcare Management System by Elandre Booth. Link in description.
caption: github.com/Elandre840/SA-HealthCare-management-System
